steps.title: Set up the percentage formula
steps.content:
To find the percentage of size-large paper clips, use:
percentage = $$\frac{\text{part}}{\text{whole}} \times 100 = \frac{234,000}{300,000} \times 100$$

steps.title: Simplify and calculate
steps.content:
Cancel three zeros from both numerator and denominator:
$$\frac{234,000}{300,000} = \frac{234}{300}$$
Next, divide both by 3:
$$\frac{234}{300} = \frac{78}{100} = 78\%$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
